title: Administrative and Accounts Executive Full-time Occupation
description:
About Us

Wolfgang Violin Studio, founded in 2009, established a music academy in Singapore that focuses on Violin, Piano, and Cello. https://www.wolfgangviolin.com/copy-of-about-us

We are looking for

A full-time Administrative and Accounts Executive

Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for music and a knack for numbers? Join our team at the music school as an Administrative and Accounts Executive, where you will be a key support role in managing the financial aspects of our operations.

Key Responsibilities

Supports the Finance Manager for the following roles:

  • Performs bookkeeping and accounting work to ensure effective recording and punctual submission of financial reports for management.
  • Payroll processing, CPF calculations, quarterly GST submissions, and income tax filings.
  • Calculates monthly sales commissions, consolidates financial information, and updates database.
  • Generate relevant financial reports as required by management.
  • Optimise the use of technology for work efficiency.
  • Interacts with the Ministry of Manpower (MOM) for work pass management.
  • Maintains fixed assets schedules, manages inventory codes, and reorders supplies as needed.
  • Collaborates with the customer service and operations team to ensure prompt accurate responses for inquiries. Oversee fee collection processes.
  • Periodical review and proposal of relevant government grants. Manage grant application process.
  • Explores opportunities for engagements with different government agencies.
  • Other work as required by the Finance Manager or by Management

Requirements

  • Efficiency in Microsoft Office (Word/Excel)
  • Comfortable with the use of technology for workplace efficiency, knowledge of software: EPOS, Metro, Favour, and Carbonate is an advantage but not compulsory
  • Knowledge of IFRS 116 accounting standard preferred
  • Positive attitude, willingness to learn and possess good work ethics
  • Professional and resourceful, and able to work in a team or independently with minimum guidance
  • Good organization and time management skills
  • Strong proficiency in written and spoken English

Interested candidates can submit their application to hr@wolfgangviolin.com with their recent resume and complete details at https://tinyurl.com/FinGenOffice

Please indicate on your application heading Partimer or Full time.

postedCompany.description:
Our Directors Annie and Min Lee opened Wolfgang Violin studio in 2009 to raise a generation of young violinists who will fulfill the need for Singapore’s growing arts scene. Today we have international competition winners who are making musical waves for Singapore. Wolfgang has collaborated with CHIJ Kellock, Paya Lebar Methodist Girls’ School, Catholic High School (Pri) concerts, tours, and participated in Singapore Youth Festival, with Gold awards for Kellock on 2012, 2014, 2015, 2016,2017 and for the MGS 2012. PLMGS was awarded the Certification of Accomplishment. In 2018 Singapore Youth Festival, Kellock , PLMGS, CHS school win the Distinction.
Min Lee is an internationally acclaimed violinist who has gathered her years of experience in training and competitions overseas to start her own music academy  The goal is to create innovative programs to raise the level of music education here in Singapore.  For 6 years we have established ourselves as the experts in violin and strings programs, and the time has come to extend our programs to include piano and musicianship to strengthen our current curriculum. 
The plan to scale up the business is to constantly create new programs and new business models of MClassics Pte Ltd.  In 2015, we will launch our Piano, Musicianship Program & mobile/online learning tools and apps. This complements our present business and will create the opportunity for international expansion for our homegrown SME.
postedCompany.name: WCLASSICS PTE. LTD.
